function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-02-14 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email record was written once as required; checklist appears satisfied (recipient canonical, attachment exists/read, single attachment ordering valid, subject quoted). Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox item already read.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md with no tool error returned.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, verified identity and invoice, created outbound draft, deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note: verified the sender as Nina Schreiber via canonical entity email, confirmed the requested 2026-02-14 Nordstern invoice record, created an outbound email draft with that invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md, and removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, used inbox-email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox filename/schema, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence supports full completion: inbound request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked for Nordstern invoice dated 2026-02-14; sender address matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md; exact invoice confirmed in 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md; outbound record created in 60_outbox/outbox with correct recipient and attachment; processed inbox file deleted per workflow.
